entries.title: Qcom DTS pin-conflict fix — base board DTS vs overlay DTSO placement
Qcom DTS node override — blank line required before status property
qcom EDP PHY — NULL guard removal accepted when all platforms audited
Missing `Cc: stable@vger.kernel.org` on a stable-eligible `Fixes:` patch — flag as [MINOR]
Commit message must explain removal of named kernel element
Stray blank line within Qcom QMP PHY init-cfg tables
Lowercase "platform" as common noun in commit subjects
DT binding commit — "Add compatible string" not "Document X" for single-entry additions (subject and body)
Qcom AudioReach GPR/Q6APM/Q6PRM DTSI node hierarchy — accepted placement pattern
Qcom APCS compatible string naming -- use -apss-shared not -apcs-hmss-global
DT binding commit body — include device type and definite article for compatible-string additions
Prefer direct `return` over intermediate `ret` variable in early-return int functions
Qcom DTS hardware replacement — check for board revision or variant change
DT binding commit body — name the fallback compatible for versioned enum group additions
Void helpers performing fallible ops should return int, not rely on caller field-checks
qcom,msa-fixed-perm in new Qcom SNoC WiFi nodes — verify per-SoC by cross-referencing family DTS
qcom,coresight-itnoc DTS node name must match `^itnoc(@[0-9a-f]+)?$`
CoreSight `clock-names = "apb_pclk"` vs binding `const: apb` schema divergence
fastrpc probe — verify carveout type before using res.start as DMA address
PCI shared WAKE# GPIO -- -EBUSY is expected; add in-code comment not error propagation
Use "shall" not "should" when quoting PCIe spec normative requirements in commit messages
DT binding commit body — explicitly name the new compatible string for single-entry additions
clk KUnit tests must be DAMP — do not modify existing test functions to add new-feature assertions
KUnit test param arrays — check ALL block comments AND desc strings for copy-paste errors
Qcom pinctrl series — DTS patches route through Bjorn's qcom SoC tree, not pinctrl tree
PCI/ASPM -- masking L1 from aspm_support must also mask L1SS
DT binding YAML — `maxItems` is redundant when an `items:` list is present
Qcom QMP PHY header — new generic PHY-index constants duplicate existing USB43DP constants
DT binding — splitting if/then/else into separate if/then blocks silently drops else constraints
`device_get_match_data()` result must be checked for NULL before use
binding adds `required:` for existing compatible — verify DTS coverage and require commit-body ABI justification
Generic kernel export commits -- hardware-specific benchmarks belong in the cover letter; problem description must survive
EXPORT_SYMBOL must match the export class used by existing related exports in the same file
Non-standard AI disclosure trailer tag — flag [NIT] and suggest prose note
DT binding commit body — state omission explicitly when a named resource is absent for a new SoC entry
Prefer early-continue guard clause inside loops to reduce nesting depth
Qcom PCIe shared bus clocks — do not vote for clocks managed by interconnect or bootloader HW_CTL
`Fixes:` tag should point to the commit that introduced the specific bug, not a later reorganization
fastrpc_buf->cctx — get()/put() must be symmetric on all alloc/free paths
Bug-fix patches missing a `Fixes:` tag — flag [MINOR]
Qcom TLMM pinctrl — modern SoCs must omit `intr_target_reg` from PINGROUP macro
ARM/Coresight --- bus_find_device() reference must be held by the caller, not dropped inside the lookup helper
fastrpc — commit body must explain DSP-side semantics of changed protocol parameters
fastrpc probe — question whether dma_alloc_coherent is appropriate for Audio PD reserved-memory
DT binding commit body — named reference SoC must have an entry in the same binding section
Qcom SCM tracepoints -- TP_fast_assign SMC args must use unsigned long throughout for cross-arch correctness
`this_cpu_write/read()` wrong when target CPU may differ from current CPU
ARM/Coresight — author-acknowledged PREEMPT_RT TODO accepted as deferred work
Do not replicate non-exported kernel function logic — propose an export patch instead
Kernel tracepoint header in drivers/ subdirectory -- Makefile include path and TRACE_INCLUDE_FILE both required
Prefer int over small unsigned integer types for loop indices
ARM/Coresight — sysfs visibility flag should suppress all non-label attrs, not specific named attrs
Static platform-quirk table not preferred when a runtime kernel API can detect the condition
New SoC DT-binding commit body — identify SoC family context and companion driver
DT binding example using a cross-tree compatible fails Rob's dt_binding_check at rc1 base
Multi-variant DRM panel driver -- per-variant supply code is dispatch-table gated; -ENODEV false-positive guard
Timed busy-wait under spin_lock_irqsave() — verify timeout < minimum hardware watchdog deadline
Write/send callback returning 0 instead of negative errno on submit failure silently drops data
Qcom TLMM pinctrl — `.ngpios` must count GPIO-only pins; IPCAT SDC confusion
Large PHY-mode-framework patches must be split into logical incremental steps
PHY binding — new provider-side topology property may be questioned as redundant with consumer phys cells
pinctrl-spmi-gpio — cast spacing in of_device_id table follows pre-existing style; [NIT] not [MINOR]
Driver probe must not overwrite a global module_param to encode per-device state
Qcom clock driver `qcom_cc_desc` — verify whether `.use_rpm` is needed
Qcom SMD-RPM --- SNOC bus clocks may serve audio NPA nodes despite no icc consumers
Qcom GCC reset tables --- check for missing secondary USB PHY BCR
Qcom rpmhpd — identical *_rpmhpds[] array must be deduplicated; reuse existing descriptor or use DT fallback compatible
Standalone export-only patches without a consumer in the same series are NAKed
Negative int return from count-get function assigned to unsigned int without error check
Qcom DT compatible strings — deprecated internal IP block names must not appear in upstream naming
New DT fallback compatible must have a corresponding driver of_device_id entry
Unsigned int count field used as a zero-ambiguous cache-populated sentinel
DTS idle state removal — commit body must explain specific cpuidle/governor context, not just vague performance claim
Use "aligning with" or "consistent with" instead of "inline with" in commit bodies
DT binding — multiple new compatible strings in one patch must be placed symmetrically
Qcom QMP PHY init tables — duplicate register write without explanatory comment is likely copy-paste redundancy
regmap_config.max_register must cover all register addresses used in the series
Platform-specific sub-feature binding — check existing SoC compatible before adding a new one
Large complexity-adding series must state concrete technical benefits in cover letter
Unexplained vendor-internal chip abbreviations in commit bodies --- flag [NIT]
ath12k QMI optional TLV capability fields — no stale-value concern when phy_cap_send reruns on SERVER_ARRIVE
`pci_irq_vector()` return value — use `>= 0` as error check, not `> 0`
ath12k series — missing KITE branch tree tag blocks all automated CI testing
Tracepoint placed after a multi-exit function — check whether early-return paths bypass it
Tracepoint/instrumentation series commit bodies must state the observability motivation
DRM_BRIDGE_OP_HDMI_AUDIO requires hdmi_write_audio_infoframe and hdmi_clear_audio_infoframe callbacks
Holding a driver mutex across request_firmware() or a long msleep() blocks all protected operations
i2c_device_id table must not use DT-style "vendor,device" vendor prefix
GENMASK bit-field expansion with no current in-tree consumer — commit message must state preparatory intent and ABI safety
ARM/Coresight — per-CPU sticky failure flags must be cleared on device unregister and module removal
ARM/Coresight — question new `coresight_device` struct fields applicable only to a device subtype
DT binding — new compatible added to deprecated: true schema without updating the non-deprecated successor
Commit subject -- "Enable X support" implies toggling existing feature; use "Add X support" for new hardware
Qcom PAS DT binding YAML — use GPL-2.0 OR BSD-2-Clause not GPL-2.0-only OR BSD-2-Clause
DT binding allOf if/then with single-compatible enum is always-true — move constraints to top-level properties
DT binding example — arm-gic interrupt specifier takes exactly 3 cells; trailing extra cell is a bug
"While at it" in commit body signals separable generic-infrastructure change — recommend patch split
DT binding YAML --- `$nodename` pattern must be anchored with `^` and `$`
Regulator driver --- `n_voltages` must equal `max_sel + 1`, not voltage-range / step-size + 1
Regulator driver --- `active_discharge_on` must be set when `active_discharge_reg` and `active_discharge_mask` are used
DT binding YAML `title:` must describe the hardware block, not the software driver
DT binding schema must declare `interrupts-extended` if the example uses it
New DT binding for a single named SoC must use a SoC-specific compatible as primary entry
Firmware protocol response -- negative `int` errno assigned to `u32` status field silently corrupts the error code
Virtual regulator `.disable` op must call `regulator_disable()` unconditionally
qcom interconnect binding example -- qcom,bcm-voters must not carry a # prefix
qcom interconnect driver -- BCM nodes[] must include all masters routing through that BCM
Qcom GCC + icc-clk -- bundle icc-clk support with the initial GCC driver introduction commit
icc-clk binding header -- each node ID group must have a backing clock in the GCC clock header
checkpatch TYPO_SPELLING false positive for "SoM" (System-on-Module)
DT binding YAML — single-entry `enum:` list should be `const:`
Qcom DTS — `status = "okay"` is redundant when the node is not disabled in the base DTSI
drm/msm — prefer `guard()` scoped lock over raw `mutex_lock()`/`mutex_unlock()`
ath12k QMI — new optional capability field in phy_cap_resp must appear in the existing ath12k_dbg() log call
Counter incremented under mutex in power_up but decremented without lock in power_down — flag [BUG]
__free(firmware) is a valid kernel scope cleanup specifier — do not flag as invalid
DTS GPIO/property polarity correction — check binding YAML examples for matching stale value
Qcom DTS series — ARM32 patches must be submitted separately from arm64 patches
ARM/Coresight CTI — do not annotate hardware-variant flag check with `unlikely()`
ARM/Coresight CTI — prefer (offset, index) parameter pair over single bit-packed register encoding
ARM/Coresight CTI — store bank index in `cs_off_attribute`; use `container_of()` in sysfs visibility callback
ath12k platform-variant series -- each patch must explain backward compatibility
Intentionally discarded return value in teardown path -- add comment or log
Qcom Geni I2C clock-mode table -- hardcoded array index into geni_i2c_clk_map_* is fragile; use mode-based lookup
Struct field widening (e.g. u8 to u16) requires a comment explaining bit-width rationale and max values per mode
Qcom QUPv3 -- new hardware-mode feature must include a runtime version capability check
Qcom Geni I2C -- prefer ternary over if/else for single-argument conditional function calls
Probe error-label EPROBE_DEFER guard -- `return 0` leaks resources and returns false success
Qcom PCIe -- per-boot operational message should use dev_dbg, not dev_info
ARM/Coresight ETM4x --- seq_ctrl[] is sized for transitions (3), not states (4); rename macro accordingly
Qcom IMEM/SRAM stats and debugfs reader drivers belong in drivers/soc/qcom/, not drivers/firmware/qcom/
Qualcomm Innovation Center copyright must use the year-less format
Qcom SRAM/IMEM stats driver --- define memory layout as struct and use memcpy_fromio() instead of per-field readl_relaxed()
Qcom debugfs stats driver --- add files under existing /sys/kernel/debug/qcom_stats/, not a new directory
Qcom driver --- do not list multiple of_device_id compatible strings when the driver does not differentiate behaviour between them
ARM/Coresight --- _coresight_build_path() multi-path contamination is out-of-spec; do not flag
ARM/Coresight device_unregister inside coresight_mutex causes circular lock dependency
ARM/Coresight subtype union must not be accessed without checking csdev->type first
Preparatory patch must not contain logic deferred to a later patch in the series description
Notifier-handle pointer must not be used in a 3-state (NULL / valid / ERR_PTR) pattern — flag [BUG]
ath12k multi-device shared-state constructor must not embed hardware-specific IDs — flag [MINOR]
reinit_completion() must precede the action that triggers the completion — race window if placed after the triggering call
ICC bandwidth vote acquired in probe must be released on all subsequent error paths
devm_of_icc_get(NULL) -- interconnect-names DT property is not consumed by the driver
Race-condition fix commit message must describe intermittent failure, not overstate as unconditional
ndo_start_xmit runs in atomic/softirq context — use pm_runtime_get() not pm_runtime_resume_and_get()
netdev_tx_t must return NETDEV_TX_OK or NETDEV_TX_BUSY, never a negative errno
Commit body copy-pasted from sibling patch — wrong driver or subsystem name silently present
`Fixes:` patch in a feature series must be decoupled for stable backport
ath12k AHB — new qcom_scm_pas*() callers conflict with pending OP-TEE PAS migration
Atomic lifecycle counter — decrement must not execute on paths where increment was never reached — flag [BUG]
Qcom PCIe DT binding example - use GIC_SPI not GIC_ESPI for standard PCIe interrupts
Qcom PCIe DT binding example - reset-gpios undeclared; perst-gpios is the correct name
QMP PHY register offset headers - no leading zeros for sub-0x100 hex values
checkpatch TYPO_SPELLING false positive for Synopsys (semiconductor company name)
Qcom automotive SoC new series — cover letter must clarify if SoC is new silicon or a VM partition of existing hardware
Macro wrapper for implicit THIS_MODULE — use descriptive suffix, not `__` prefix, for the exported implementation
Changing an initcall level must update the function's timing-rationale comment
`pure_initcall` for early infrastructure — confirm no other `pure_initcall` user accesses the resource before raising link-order concern
`reboot-mode` child node of `arm,psci` node — psci.yaml `additionalProperties: false` requires binding update first
PSCI binding guard for reboot-mode uses arm,psci-1.0 but SYSTEM_RESET2 is PSCI 1.1
reboot-mode DTS nodes must include a compatible property for driver to bind
MFD cell fwnode assignment must come after mfd_acpi_add_device() not before
reboot-mode mode-* DT properties must be single u32; of_property_read_u32() ignores subsequent cells
Unnecessary UEFI/kernel load-address comments in Qcom reserved-memory
Qcom SoC base DTSI psci node must carry a psci: label
cache-size property missing in Qcom DTS L2/L3 cache nodes
Qcom MPM qcom,mpm-pin-count must match RPM firmware virtual count
DTS reg address entries must use consistent hex zero-padding width
`Co-developed-by:` must not replicate the `From:` author
DT binding fallback-group addition — commit body must confirm hardware property compatibility with fallback SoC
New pci/pwrctrl driver for named endpoint chip -- check for parallel series by other authors
MHI client series — question framework-level PM centralisation before accepting per-client data-path guards
New SoC driver descriptor limiting a shared config parameter — commit body must explain hardware reason for the limit
DT binding YAML example — hardware-specific property values must match the target SoC
New kernel bus_type .dma_configure must call iommu_device_use_default_domain() and provide .dma_cleanup
Probe-time entity-count dev_info() calls rejected — use dev_dbg() or tracing
`BIT(n)` preferred over `GENMASK(n,n)` for single-bit driver config fields --- flag [NIT]
qcom-pdc multi-mode series --- cover letter must document test configurations and results
irqchip register read-modify-write on a field shared with another irqchip path must hold the chip lock
Function pointer in driver struct assigned the same concrete function on all paths --- justify or remove
`Co-authored-by:` (GitHub convention) is non-standard --- use `Co-developed-by:` + matching `Signed-off-by:`
perf cs-etm state machine extension --- new packet type case must call cs_etm__packet_swap() for correct boundary tracking
`__free()` cleanup-helper variable declared after a statement — do not flag "declaration after statement"
qcom GCC driver — trivial reset/clock omission from original series draws maintainer question
qcom-pcie legacy-binding driver workaround — maintainer requests DT migration instead
dev_warn() in recursive DT-traversal function causes log spam — flag [NIT], suggest dev_warn_once()
sdhci-msm ICE fields and probe code must be guarded by #ifdef CONFIG_MMC_CRYPTO
GPI DMA `gchan->config` must be accessed via protocol-discriminated cast, not raw byte offset
`geni_se_clk_freq_match` must use exact match when HS timing constants are pre-computed for a specific source frequency
checkpatch TYPO_SPELLING false positive for "TRE" in GPI/GENI DMA code
Defensive NULL parameter guards in static internal driver functions are unwanted
`device_may_wakeup()` in PM suspend implies IRQ registration — redundant `irq_num > 0` guards rejected
GPI DMA new TRE type requires updating MAX_TRE and descriptor ring allocation
i2c-qcom-geni — new I2C opcode must be added to all opcode condition guards, not only TRE construction
New hardware-mode feature commit body must state which hardware makes the mode necessary and what existing code lacked
devres LIFO ordering — async work cancel action must be registered after DMA channels and mutexes
Explicit free of devm-managed resources inside a devres callback causes double-free
Qcom osm-l3/EPSS driver — new SoC-specific LUT-entry cap must be audited against sibling small-class SoCs
DT binding YAML example — embedded DTS node contents must use tab indentation, not spaces
Qcom clk/GDSC --- BRANCH_HALT on gated clock branches is a mechanically implied companion to HW_CTRL_TRIGGER; commit body need not enumerate it separately
Venus pm_helpers --- devm_pm_domain_attach_list() stub may leave core->pmdomains NULL when CONFIG_PM_GENERIC_DOMAINS is disabled; guard before pd_devs access
DRM colorop — repeated `->next` linked-list traversal appearing 3+ times should be extracted into a named iterator macro
work_struct embedded in heap-allocated struct requires cancel_work_sync() in teardown path
remoteproc subdev stop/unprepare unbalanced call -- per-callback NULL guard is symptom fix; subdevs_started bool is preferred architectural fix
of_find_device_by_node() + dev_get_drvdata() NULL must return -EPROBE_DEFER, not -ENODEV
Phandle-resolved drvdata cast — validate target is the expected driver type before use
DT binding YAML — `properties: X: true` in an `allOf if/then` does not restrict X to that compatible
`ERR_PTR()` in a header stub requires `<linux/err.h>` — header must be self-contained
`dev_get_drvdata()` NULL in probe-reachable lookup → return `-EPROBE_DEFER`, not `-ENODEV`
Stack-allocated completion passed to async hardware transaction — UAF on `wait_for_completion_timeout()` timeout without cancel
pinctrl — new function enum value must be added to ALL parallel function-name arrays
devres LIFO ordering — framework-registered data must not be allocated after `devm_*_register()`
spmi-gpio — software pseudo-function index must bypass hardware function register write
pinctrl — new pinconf parameter in `_set` must have matching `_get` implementation
GENI SE I2C — conf registers not restored after system sleep when moved to probe-only
geni_se_clk_freq_match() nearest-match may pair wrong SCL counters with returned clock index
SE_GENI_CLK_SEL write must mask index with CLK_SEL_MSK to avoid setting reserved bits
pinctrl — level-shifter pseudo-function must enforce mutual exclusivity with hardware GPIO output functions
`clk_ops.is_enabled` returning negative errno is treated as "enabled" — intentional conservative behavior; require comment
Qcom TCSR YAML — SoC-specific compatibles with unique supply topologies must get their own binding file, not extend sm8550-tcsr.yaml
CLK `enable`/`disable` callbacks run under spinlock — `udelay` is correct; `usleep_range` is wrong
Boot-enabled QREF clock — `unprepare` calling `regulator_bulk_disable` without prior kernel `prepare` is unbalanced
DT binding YAML `allOf if/then` — `compatible: enum` doesn't match array-typed property; use `contains: const` or `contains: enum`
DT binding YAML `allOf if/then` — `minItems` in `then:` without `required:` does not prevent absent mandatory properties
Qcom iris/media — `iris_vpu_power_off_hw()` disables power domains before disabling hardware clocks
Qcom USB DWC3 board DTS — `dr_mode = "otg"` is the default and should be dropped
Qcom USB DWC3 — `usb-role-switch` belongs in SoC DTSI, not board DTS
`usb-c-connector` in pmic-glink node — SBU endpoint must use `port@2`, not `port@1`
`local_t` must not be used for per-device shared state — use `atomic_t`
DTS uses clock constant from prerequisite series not yet in tree — causes DT build failure
Qcom iris series must base on `media-committers/next`, not linux-next
Qcom clock driver — prefer `.clk_cbcrs` over bare `qcom_branch_set_clk_en()` calls in probe
Qcom DISPCC/GPUCC binding — new SoC extends existing SoC binding with more inputs; check existing SoC hardware too
Qcom DISPCC/GPUCC — static global struct pointer rewritten in probe to select per-compatible freq_tbl
Overly broad `prerequisite-patch-id` list must not gate an entire series on unrelated DT infrastructure prerequisites
DT binding `if:` condition must use `contains:` not `properties:` for array-valued `compatible`
DT binding conditional `then:` with `minItems` without `required:` silently passes absent properties
sdhci-msm — `MMC_CAP2_CRYPTO` guard in early-probe helper is always false at cold-boot; but the same helper may be re-invoked during PM resume with caps2 already set
Qcom DISPCC/GPUCC driver — silently changing `fw_name` or GDSC flags/wait_vals for existing SoC while adding new SoC support
API-removal series replaces convenience API with verbose inline at 20+ sites — reviewer will request a replacement wrapper
Functional API change must not be mixed with parameter renames or cleanup in the same patch
DRM/MSM DP — `atomic_enable()` serialization justifies RMW; "same thread" comment is incorrect and will be rejected
DRM struct using custom `->next` pointer instead of `struct list_head` will draw maintainer question
New DRM atomic rejection semantics for a new object type may break existing IGT colorop tests
TRACE_EVENT `__dynamic_array` — do not add a redundant `__field` for its length
ARM/Coresight CTI — vendor-extension header must be folded into `coresight-cti.h`; separate file causes circular dependency
ARM/Coresight CTI — do not write to CLAIMSET/CLAIMCLR for Qcom CTI; bypass claim operations via helpers
Multi-version series — carry `Reviewed-by`/`Acked-by` tags from prior version into updated patches
Qcom DT binding filename missing `qcom,` prefix silently drops linux-arm-msm from get_maintainer
Test binary using fork()+pipes — unused pipe ends must be closed after fork()
Test binary functions grep'd by name from shell script must have external linkage
Qcom CAMSS — identical SoC resource struct should use DTS fallback, not duplicate struct + new enum value
DT binding — per-compatible `minItems:` difference requires per-compatible item descriptions via if/then blocks
Qcom CAMSS DT node — IOMMU SID list must be complete and justified against sibling SoC
Qcom DTS overlay shared by multiple boards — filename must reflect the common base, not one specific board
Sensor DTS node — absent regulators require inline comment explaining supply source
Qcom CAMSS binding — CSIPHY must be described as distinct sub-nodes, not monolithic registers in the CAMSS parent
ARM/Coresight CTI — `cti_allocate_trig_con()` bitmask sized by `nr_trig_max` needs in/out-sigs bounds check
ARM/Coresight CTI — new banked sysfs register attrs require `Documentation/ABI/testing/sysfs-bus-coresight-devices-cti` update
`tools/` user-space test binary must not include `<linux/compiler.h>` — use `__attribute__((noinline))` directly
drm/msm Adreno GPU series must base on msm-next-robclark, not linux-next
Cover letter changelog must itemize specific changes, not just cite reviewer names or vague summaries
Networking patches targeting the `net` or `net-next` tree must carry a `[PATCH net]` or `[PATCH net-next]` subject prefix
Verbose "Dostoyevsky" cover letter with AI hallmarks — pinctrl maintainer requests Assisted-by tag
`irq_chip_*_parent()` helpers do not check `parent_data` for NULL — explicit guard required when hierarchy is trimmed
Race-fix series without Cc: stable — maintainer may request BROKEN marker patch first
Series listing unmerged cross-tree prerequisites — maintainer skips review as unmergeable and untestable
Qcom PCIe DT binding — compatible string must follow `qcom,pcie-<soc>` (function-first) convention
pinctrl — mutual exclusivity between a software pseudo-function and physical GPIO functions must be enforced at `pinconf_set` time
DT binding `qcom,pmic-id`-style properties — do not use instance IDs; use DT-standard identification
DT binding custom vendor voltage/enable property — check for standard pinconf generic properties first
Trivially-small follow-up that only modifies prerequisite-series files — squash into prerequisite
Qcom clock patch subject says "drop critical clocks" but includes non-CLK_IS_CRITICAL clocks — commit body must explain all removed clocks
New board DTS with custom GPIO-key or button GPIOs must include pinctrl states
`regulator-always-on` on a supply that has a functional consumer — question whether it is needed
New board DTS — `/delete-node/` + recreate reserved-memory nodes when only `reg` changes; prefer property override
`Reported-by:` must not be used for non-bug improvements — use `Suggested-by:`
Commit body "the only X" uniqueness claim — verify before accepting
Qcom CAMSS DT binding — CSIPHY must be a distinct sub-node; flat embedded-CSIPHY topology is blocked
DTS overlay filename must enumerate all covered board variants when shared across multiple boards
Qcom CAMSS DT binding — CSIPHY must be a distinct sub-node; monolithic CAMSS binding embedding CSIPHY will be rejected
Non-functional stub commit adding empty driver descriptor — resources deferred to a later patch in the same series
fastrpc bug-fix patch — verify the defect is not already fixed in linux-next before reviewing
Qcom variant binding — `compatible: const:` rejects multi-string fallback array; use `oneOf:` when a parent wrapper defines fallback compatibles
Qcom GENI SPI/SE driver — `geni_se_resources_init()` leaves `se->clk` as ERR_PTR on ACPI; subsequent `clk_round_rate()` will dereference ERR_PTR
Qcom GENI SE — `geni_se_resources_activate()` does not restore OPP rate on resume; subsequent transfers may see zero-voltage state
Qcom GENI SPI — GPI DMA path (`setup_gsi_xfer`) must use the same clock/rate abstraction as the non-DMA path; hard-coded `get_spi_clk_cfg` breaks SCMI platforms
